summary: A trailer for National Geographic's series 'To Catch a Smuggler' Season 10 (on Hulu), set to music. Yellow title cards ('DON'T DO IT', 'WHEN YOU'RE CAUGHT') appear between footage of agents searching luggage on an airport conveyor and a nighttime house raid.

script.scene: Black screen with the NatGeo 'To Catch a Smuggler' logo (top left) and 'hulu' (top right); bold yellow title card 'DON'T DO IT' over music.
An agent in gloves pulls a dark duffel bag off a stainless airport baggage conveyor; caption 'We wear many hats.'
Yellow title card 'WHEN YOU'RE CAUGHT' on black with the show and Hulu branding.
Night exterior of a tile-roofed house lit pink and red, NatGeo logo centered; caption 'Running out the back.'
Dark, handheld shot of officers' legs around a person on the ground during a nighttime raid; caption 'That's at the front door with your hands up.'

notable_text: TO CATCH A SMUGGLER; hulu; DON'T DO IT; WHEN YOU'RE CAUGHT; We wear many hats.; Running out the back.; That's at the front door with your hands up.
